validation_results.method: Cloned Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager at parent 4e9d9169 (baseline) and at canonical 495f0805; ran tests/test.sh against each. Also tested a partial implementation (storage key + empty stub module) to confirm gates degrade gracefully (no trivial inflation).

notes: v0.4.3 fix was the SWE-rebench stub: install_config.json had FAIL_TO_PASS=[] which triggered the 'fall back to overall pass rate' branch — ANY agent (including no-op) ran `bun x vitest run` over the existing repo, picked up all pre-existing passing tests, and scored ~1.0. Every v0.4.3 trial scored ≥0.99 = degenerate ceiling. Rescue: REPLACED the SWE-rebench scaffold with 6 structural F2P gates modeled on amytis-task-103a94, each running python3 regex against the patched repo's source files. Gates check: (1) StorageKeys.gvSnowEffect added [0.15], (2) snowEffect/index.ts module exports startSnowEffect + creates canvas + position:fixed + pointer-events:none + rAF + chrome.storage read [0.25], (3) content/index.tsx imports & calls startSnowEffect [0.15], (4) Popup.tsx wires snow useState + gvSnowEffect payload + UI Switch [0.20], (5) module has full lifecycle: appendChild + remove() + cancelAnimationFrame + storage.onChanged listener [0.15], (6) test file exists with ≥2 it()/test() blocks + ≥3 expect() + canvas + storage references [0.10]. Sum=1.00. Anti-overfitting: matches behavioral patterns over exact identifiers (e.g., useState hook accepts any 'snow'-named identifier; storage key accepts both literal 'gvSnowEffect' and GV_SNOW_* uppercase keys; module path accepts .ts or .tsx; storage listener regex matches both `chrome.storage.onChanged.addListener` and `chrome.storage?.onChanged?.addListener`). Validated: baseline=0.0, canonical=1.0, partial-stub=0.15. p2p_failed hardcoded false. f2p_any_pass guarded with `existing<=0` per scoring trap catalog. Weighted-replace tail bounded to [0,1].
